task_completion.description: The agent successfully crawled the target website using Screaming Frog SEO Spider.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screaming Frog SEO Spider GUI is open with 'https://books.toscrape.com/' in the URL bar at the top, and the main window shows crawl progress or populated results.

task_completion.description: The agent exported the duplicate page titles to a CSV file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screaming Frog UI showing the 'Page Titles' tab with the 'Duplicate' filter applied, an export dialog saving to 'duplicate_titles.csv', or a file manager/terminal showing 'duplicate_titles.csv' exists in ~/Documents/SEO/exports/.

task_completion.description: The agent exported the duplicate H1 tags to a CSV file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screaming Frog UI showing the 'H1' tab with the 'Duplicate' filter applied, an export dialog saving to 'duplicate_h1s.csv', or a file manager/terminal showing 'duplicate_h1s.csv' exists in ~/Documents/SEO/exports/.

task_completion.description: The agent created the cannibalization report file in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor open with the file 'cannibalization_report.txt' or a file manager/terminal showing the file exists in ~/Documents/SEO/reports/.

task_completion.description: The report includes the total number of pages crawled and the counts of duplicate titles and H1s.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text visible in the 'cannibalization_report.txt' file explicitly stating the total pages crawled, the number of duplicate titles found, and the number of duplicate H1s found.

task_completion.description: The report identifies the top 3 most-duplicated titles and provides specific remediation recommendations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text visible in the 'cannibalization_report.txt' file listing the top 3 duplicated titles and a section containing actionable recommendations for fixing the cannibalization issues.

integrity.description: The agent actually used the Screaming Frog SEO Spider GUI to perform the crawl.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the Screaming Frog application open and actively used, rather than the agent just writing scripts or manually creating files without crawling.

integrity.description: The CSV files contain actual exported data from the crawl.
integrity.visual_evidence: If the CSV files are opened, they should contain tabular data with headers typical of Screaming Frog exports (e.g., Address, Occurrences, Title 1, H1-1) rather than being empty or manually typed dummy data.

integrity.description: The report appears to be written based on the actual crawl findings.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report is being edited in a text editor and the length appears substantial (at least ~400 bytes/a few paragraphs). The numbers in the report should plausibly match the data seen in the Screaming Frog UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL: https://books.toscrape.com/. Expected exports directory: /home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/. Expected reports directory: /home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/. Expected title export file: duplicate_titles.csv. Expected H1 export file: duplicate_h1s.csv. Expected report file: cannibalization_report.txt. The report must be at least 400 bytes in size, meaning it should look like a substantial multi-paragraph document containing the required metrics and recommendations.
